title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: REDMOND WINTER SHELTER BY SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. A meal is served each night. To-go bags are given out each morning. 1350 South Highway 97 Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older, families with minor children, and well behaved pets Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-7am Email (541) 388-2096 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (541) 388-2096 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Homeless Families Extreme Weather Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters * Homeless Families If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
